review_comment: I don't know how this works, but it seems to work.
Yeah, rather than over-thinking I just copied what is already working for `DefaultSongProgress`.

Basically `OverlayContainer` steals mouse/key/hover events from the gameplay cursor/input layer (which in turn switches the cursor from gameplay to menu, because of the [`HoveredDrawables`-based cursor visibility logic](https://github.com/ppy/osu/blob/ef10145d6f9f77117e6e148cf82f76f6b89ffdb4/osu.Game/Graphics/Cursor/GlobalCursorDisplay.cs#L74-L81)), so when overriding these to `false`, the container no longer steals events and input is received normally.
